headline: Energy: What to watch at CERAWeek amid Iran war, rising oil prices
summary: World energy leaders and officials will convene at the CERAWeek conference starting March 23, which is annually hosted by S&P Global and has been dubbed the "Davos of energy." Yahoo Finance Breaking News Reporter Jake Conley speaks with Market Catalysts Host Julie Hyman about the topics that will be tackled at CERAWeek — not just the recent rise in oil prices (CL=F, BZ=F) in relation to Iran's closure of the Strait of Hormuz amid escalating conflicts — as well as the top executives they will be interviewing at the event.

headline: Anew Climate Joins Carbon Measures to Advance Global Carbon Accounting Standards and Policies Supporting Market-Based Solutions
summary: HOUSTON, TX / ACCESS Newswire / March 23, 2026 / Anew Climate, a global leader in low-carbon fuels and climate solutions, today announced it has joined Carbon Measures, a cross-industry coalition working to develop a new global carbon accounting framework ...
